name: WisdomTree, Inc.
business: WisdomTree offers a diverse suite of exchange-traded products (ETPs), model portfolios, private market investments (farmland), and digital asset-related products. It distributes through major asset management channels including banks, brokerage firms, registered investment advisers, institutional investors, private wealth managers, and online brokers. The company also provides technology-enabled solutions like Advisor and Portfolio Solutions programs.
namedSuppliers: Newton Investment Management North America, LLC
The Bank of New York Mellon (BNY Mellon)
BNY Mellon Fund Services (Ireland) Designated Activity Company

exposures.sentence: We offer next-generation digital products and services related to tokenized real world assets and stablecoins, including Digital Funds, as well as our institutional platform, WisdomTree Connect, and blockchain-native digital wallet, WisdomTree Prime.
We also have expanded into private assets through our acquisition of Ceres, a leading U.S.-based alternative asset manager specializing in farmland investments.
We are integrating artificial intelligence (AI) into certain aspects of our daily workflows to drive scalability and efficiency, while continuing to assess its broader applications over time.
We use AI, including machine learning, in our business and expect to continue to expand our AI capabilities, including through generative AI.

tamClaims.claim: Aggregate AUM of ETPs globally was $18.2 trillion as of December 31, 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, aggregate AUM of ETPs globally was $18.2 trillion.
